Karl Friedrich Schinkel

2 works in the gallery.

Gothic Church among Oaks
by Karl Friedrich Schinkel
Germany, 19th century · 1810 · lithograph with tint stone
Gothic Church Behind an Oak Grove with Tombs
by Karl Friedrich Schinkel
Germany · 1810 · Lithograph in black ink with touches of opaque white watercolor on brown wove paper
